use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms and interfaces
Destructive action buttons for delete or warning confirmations
Navigation trigger buttons with hover states
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbar interfaces
Ghost or link-style buttons for inline actions
ai_summary: A versatile Button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes, built with class-variance-authority and Radix UI Slot for composition. Includes proper focus-visible accessibility rings, disabled states, and supports asChild prop for component composition. Standard shadcn/ui-style implementation suitable for any React interface requiring action triggers.
